response.original_title: Why We Don’t Want AVA (Agribusiness Venture Arrangements)
response.overview: This 15-minute agitprop film is a rapid-fire volley of incisive information on the monopoly of land in Mindanao by foreign corporations and the recurring fallacy of every proposed land reform since even the era of Spanish colonization.
response.title: Why We Don’t Want AVA (Agribusiness Venture Arrangements)
